query: SELECT ul.id, ul.userId, ul.latitude, ul.longitude, ul.isSharing, ul.lastUpdated, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, ul.lastUpdated, NOW()) as minutesAgo, u.name, p.trainerName, p.gender FROM userLocations ul JOIN users u ON ul.userId = u.id LEFT JOIN profiles p ON p.userId = u.id ORDER BY ul.lastUpdated DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4JQihNFt71oUk4Z.root --database DZLsNMXz8tKivpZtpPajU7 --execute SELECT ul.id, ul.userId, ul.latitude, ul.longitude, ul.isSharing, ul.lastUpdated, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, ul.lastUpdated, NOW()) as minutesAgo, u.name, p.trainerName, p.gender FROM userLocations ul JOIN users u ON ul.userId = u.id LEFT JOIN profiles p ON p.userId = u.id ORDER BY ul.lastUpdated DESC;
